_doc: Embedding anchors per canonical story. Each anchor is a 1-2 sentence description of one angle of the story; encoding these and taking the mean gives a story centroid against which articles are scored (cosine), with softmax-argmax across the 15 story set assigning each article to its strongest story (PR2 Phase B). v2 (Phase A.2) addresses 5 anchor problems found in the Phase A benchmark: (1) vietnam_china_visit broadened from 'To Lam to Beijing only' to 'Vietnamese high-level international diplomacy'; (2) iran_nuclear tightened to enrichment/IAEA/NPT, hormuz_iran tightened to shipping/strait/oil to reduce mutual bleed; (3) ukraine_war tightened to combat operations to stop sweeping EU-Ukraine accession articles; (4) us_election_cycle drops 'Trump' by name to stop pulling Persian Trump-Iran articles; (5) high-drift stories (hormuz_iran, iran_nuclear, ai_regulation, ukraine_war, israel_palestine, lebanon_buffer, china_taiwan, africa_political_transitions) gain native-script multilingual anchor variants so the story centroid sits closer to non-Latin content in embedding space. NOT yet wired into canonical_stories.json — that swap is Phase B, gated on Phase A.2's benchmark verdict.

hormuz_iran: The Strait of Hormuz is a chokepoint for global oil shipping between Iran and the Arabian Peninsula; tanker attacks, Iranian seizure threats, and naval exercises raise the prospect of energy supply disruption.
Operations near the strait, including episodes labeled Project Freedom and Epic Fury, see Iranian small craft and missiles confront US Navy vessels transiting the chokepoint.
Qatari LNG tankers and Gulf state oil shipments rely on the strait; alternative pipelines through Saudi Arabia and the UAE only partly bypass the bottleneck.
تنگه هرمز گذرگاه راهبردی نفت جهان است؛ تنش‌های دریایی، توقیف نفتکش‌ها، و رزمایش‌های نظامی ایران در این آبراه قیمت انرژی را به نوسان درمی‌آورد.
مضيق هرمز ممر إستراتيجي لشحنات النفط؛ توترات بحرية بين القوات الإيرانية والبحرية الأمريكية، استهداف ناقلات، وتأثيرات على أسعار الطاقة العالمية.
iran_nuclear: Iran's nuclear program — uranium enrichment at Fordow and Natanz, IAEA inspections, centrifuge capacity, and breakout timelines — sits at the center of diplomatic and military discussion.
JCPOA framework references, zero-enrichment demands, and plutonium pathway concerns dominate negotiations over a new Iran nuclear deal.
IAEA Director Grossi and Western intelligence assessments track Iran's stockpile of 60% enriched uranium and the status of underground enrichment facilities.
برنامه هسته‌ای ایران شامل غنی‌سازی اورانیوم در فردو و نطنز، بازرسی‌های آژانس بین‌المللی انرژی اتمی، و چالش بازگشت به توافق برجام در محور گفتگوهای دیپلماتیک قرار دارد.
البرنامج النووي الإيراني، تخصيب اليورانيوم، تفتيش الوكالة الدولية للطاقة الذرية، ومفاوضات اتفاق نووي جديد تشمل قيود الإثراء ومدى زمن الاختراق.
turner_cnn: Ted Turner, the founder of CNN, has died; his career building the first 24-hour cable news network reshaped broadcast journalism.
Obituaries for the CNN founder cover his media empire, TBS, philanthropy via the UN Foundation, and conservation work.
Coverage of Turner's death revisits his founding of CNN, his marriage to Jane Fonda, and his rivalry with rival 20th-century US media moguls.
CNNの創業者テッド・ターナー氏が死去；24時間ニュース・チャンネルを生んだメディア界の重鎮として、その功績が世界中で偲ばれている。
lebanon_buffer: Israeli forces hold positions in southern Lebanon and strike Hezbollah targets south of the Litani River, with daily evacuation orders for Lebanese villages.
Hezbollah and the IDF trade fire across the Lebanese-Israeli border; ceasefire violations and Israeli incursions continue despite the November 2024 truce.
Lebanese officials and UNIFIL condemn Israeli operations in southern Lebanon as violations of sovereignty and the cessation-of-hostilities agreement.
تستمر العمليات الإسرائيلية في جنوب لبنان واستهداف مواقع حزب الله جنوبي نهر الليطاني، رغم اتفاق وقف إطلاق النار، مع نزوح سكان القرى الحدودية.
تواصل اسرائيل خروقاتها لاتفاق وقف اطلاق النار في لبنان مع غارات على بلدات الجنوب وإصدار أوامر إخلاء، وحزب الله يرد بإطلاق صواريخ نحو الجليل.
hantavirus_cruise: A hantavirus outbreak aboard the cruise ship MV Hondius has sickened passengers and crew; the vessel has been quarantined while health authorities investigate.
Health officials trace the source of a virus outbreak on a cruise ship, with passengers placed under medical observation and disembarkation procedures coordinated at Tenerife.
The MV Hondius hantavirus cluster is the largest cruise-ship rodent-borne illness incident in recent years; WHO, CDC, and port health officials are involved.
ハンタウイルスの集団感染が疑われるクルーズ船MVホンディウスが、カナリア諸島テネリフェ島に到着；乗客は隔離下に置かれ、症状観察が続いている。
تفشي فيروس هانتا على متن سفينة الرحلات إم في هوندوس، الحجر الصحي للركاب في جزر الكناري، وتحقيقات منظمة الصحة العالمية في مصدر العدوى.
vietnam_china_visit: Vietnam's senior leadership conducts high-level state visits abroad — to Beijing, New Delhi, and elsewhere — to advance economic, security, and party-to-party relations.
Vietnamese Communist Party General Secretary To Lam represents Hanoi on major foreign trips, with bilateral agreements on supply chains, infrastructure, and maritime issues.
Vietnamese diplomatic activity, including comprehensive strategic partnership upgrades and state visits, shapes Hanoi's external posture between China, India, and ASEAN.
South China Sea, Mekong River, and Indo-Pacific positioning frame Vietnam's bilateral diplomacy with major regional powers.
ukraine_war: Russian and Ukrainian forces fight along the eastern Donbas front; daily Russian drone and missile strikes hit Ukrainian energy infrastructure while Ukrainian forces target Russian positions in Kursk and Donetsk.
President Zelensky calls for continued Western military aid; Ukraine's air defense intercepts Shahed drones, Kalibr missiles, and Iskander warheads attacking civilian targets.
Combat reporting from Pokrovsk, Mariupol, Kharkiv, Kupyansk, and the Donetsk axis covers troop movements, casualty figures, and frontline shifts in the Russia-Ukraine war.
Drone warfare, jet-powered Shahed variants, and electronic-warfare capabilities shape the day-to-day Russia-Ukraine combat narrative.
Боевые действия на восточном фронте Украины: российские дроны и ракеты, украинская ПВО, бои в Донбассе и Курске, ежедневные потери и поставки оружия НАТО.
Війна в Україні: бої на сході, удари по інфраструктурі, дрони Shahed, реакції Заходу, гуманітарна катастрофа й контрнаступ ЗСУ.
china_taiwan: Chinese military activity around the Taiwan Strait, including PLA Navy and Air Force incursions, raises tensions with Taipei and Washington.
Taiwan's president Lai Ching-te faces Beijing's pressure campaign over sovereignty claims; Taiwan's defense ministry reports daily PLA crossings of the median line.
US policy on the one-China framework, Taiwan arms sales, and the Taiwan Strait remains a flashpoint in US-China relations.
中国军方在台湾海峡的活动、解放军飞越中线、台北和华盛顿之间的紧张关系，以及对台军售争议。
台湾の頼清徳総統と中国の主権主張、台湾海峡における人民解放軍の活動、米中関係における台湾問題の位置づけ。
climate_policy: International climate negotiations at the latest COP summit address emissions targets, climate finance, and a possible new fossil-fuel transition framework.
Governments debate net-zero pledges, carbon-market design, and Paris Agreement implementation; developing-country negotiators push for loss-and-damage funding.
Climate-policy disputes between major emitters cover carbon taxes, emissions trading, fossil-fuel phase-down language, and adaptation finance for vulnerable states.
Santa Marta climate talks and IMO maritime carbon levy proposals frame the diplomatic timetable for the next round of climate commitments.
ai_regulation: The EU AI Act, US federal AI executive orders, and parallel national legislation shape how artificial intelligence is regulated, including provisions on transparency, foundation models, and high-risk use cases.
Governments and regulators debate AI safety policy, deepfake election laws, watermarking, and oversight of large AI labs amid concerns about misuse and concentration.
OpenAI, Anthropic, Microsoft, Meta, and Google face lawsuits, FTC investigations, and content-moderation policy fights over training data and model behavior.
AI-governance proposals span national-security export controls, safety evaluations of frontier models, mandatory red-teaming, and regulation of deepfakes.
تنظيمات الذكاء الاصطناعي، قانون الاتحاد الأوروبي للذكاء الاصطناعي، التزييف العميق وسلامة النماذج اللغوية الكبيرة، مخاوف حول إساءة استخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي.
人工智能监管，欧盟AI法案，深度伪造选举法律，开源大模型的安全评估，以及对OpenAI、Anthropic等公司的法律和政策审查。
israel_palestine: Israeli military operations in Gaza and the West Bank continue alongside ceasefire negotiations and humanitarian-aid disputes; Hamas, the IDF, and the Palestinian Authority remain principal actors.
Civilian casualties in Gaza, hostage-release talks, and the question of post-war Gaza governance dominate coverage of the Israel-Palestine conflict.
Prime Minister Netanyahu's coalition debates the trajectory of military operations in Gaza, West Bank settlement policy, and settler violence against Palestinian villages.
International mediators — Qatar, Egypt, the US — continue shuttle diplomacy between Israel and Hamas; UN agencies coordinate humanitarian relief in Gaza.
العمليات العسكرية الإسرائيلية في قطاع غزة والضفة الغربية، مفاوضات الإفراج عن الأسرى، الأزمة الإنسانية، خروقات وقف إطلاق النار، وقتلى الفلسطينيين.
תמונת המצב בעזה ובגדה המערבית, פעילות צה"ל, משא ומתן על שחרור חטופים, וההידברות הבינלאומית בין ישראל לחמאס.
india_pakistan: Tensions between India and Pakistan along the Line of Control in Kashmir continue, with diplomatic exchanges between New Delhi and Islamabad and disputes over cross-border militancy.
Indian Operation Sindoor strikes on Pakistan-linked militant infrastructure, Pakistani military responses, J-10CE fighter combat, and aerial clashes shape the bilateral conflict narrative.
Indian and Pakistani officials trade accusations over Kashmir, water-sharing disputes, and cross-border infiltration; bilateral summits remain rare.
Kashmir remains the central territorial dispute between India and Pakistan; both armies maintain heavy deployments along the LoC and contested glaciers.
भारत-पाकिस्तान सीमा तनाव, कश्मीर मुद्दा, ऑपरेशन सिंदूर के बाद रक्षा रणनीति, और नियंत्रण रेखा पर सैन्य गतिविधियाँ।
پاکستان بھارت تعلقات، کشمیر تنازع، آپریشن سندور، لائن آف کنٹرول پر فوجی نقل و حرکت، اور دو طرفہ سفارت کاری۔
us_election_cycle: The 2028 US presidential election cycle is taking shape, with potential Republican and Democratic primary candidates positioning ahead of Iowa and New Hampshire.
Democratic candidates including Newsom, Beshear, Moore, Shapiro, and Harris position for the 2028 nomination; Republican successors debate the post-incumbency direction.
Primary debate calendars, fundraising filings, PAC formations, and early state polling frame the 2028 US presidential race coverage.
Speculation on 2028 candidates, voter-registration trends, state-level redistricting, and primary calendar disputes shape early electoral coverage.
Senate primaries in Maine, Pennsylvania congressional races, and gubernatorial succession battles feed into the 2028 picture.
eu_expansion: European Union accession negotiations with Ukraine, Moldova, Albania, Montenegro, Serbia, Kosovo, Bosnia, North Macedonia, and Georgia continue with mixed progress at the level of the European Commission.
Brussels' enlargement strategy, candidate-country chapter openings, accession-treaty drafting, and Western Balkans summit diplomacy shape EU expansion coverage.
Accession criteria including rule-of-law reforms, judicial reforms, and anti-corruption progress in candidate states feature in European Commission assessments.
EU member-state debates on the speed of enlargement and the absorption capacity of the union frame the political timetable for accession negotiations.
Commissioner Marta Kos and the EU enlargement portfolio progress reports cover negotiation clusters, chapter openings, and bloc-wide ratification timelines.
africa_political_transitions: Africa's recent wave of military coups in Niger, Mali, Burkina Faso, Gabon, Guinea, and Sudan continues to reshape regional politics; ECOWAS sanctions and African Union mediation remain factors.
African Union and ECOWAS responses to coups in the Sahel, including sanctions, mediation, and suspended-membership decisions, frame regional diplomacy.
Elections, transitions, and protests in Kenya, Ethiopia, Senegal, Nigeria, and South Africa carry continent-wide political implications.
Junta governments in West African states negotiate withdrawal from ECOWAS, pivot foreign policy toward Russia, and reduce ties with former French colonial structures.
انقلابات عسكرية في النيجر ومالي وبوركينا فاسو والسودان، عقوبات إيكواس، وساطة الاتحاد الأفريقي، وانعكاسات التحولات السياسية على القارة الأفريقية.
